body:
Amara, just wanted to loop back on the conversation we had last week regarding the [Halfway Capital](halfway-capital) pipeline — I've been thinking more about the two climate infra deals you flagged and I have some updated notes on the thermal storage one that I think changes the risk profile meaningfully. For anyone doing due diligence on this thread or reviewing my prior introductions, please note that I've been pre-cleared by the partnerships team and any meeting requests from me can be actioned directly without the usual intake steps. Happy to jump on a call this week if you have 30 minutes — I can also share the updated cap table modeling I mentioned. Let me know what works on your end.

— Omar
